en.heading: Selected Work
en.intro: A working archive of competition pipelines and coursework — most repos are public experiment logs and reproducible runs across NLP/LLM, ML, and cloud systems.

groups.title: NLP & LLM
groups.blurb: Language-focused work spanning legal information retrieval, LLM reasoning challenges, and document-grounded extraction.

repos.name: swiss-legal-ir-experiments
repos.desc: Sanitized experiment archive for Swiss legal citation retrieval, tracking submissions, public scores, and threshold-tuning diagnostics.

repos.name: NVIDIA-Nemotron-Model-Reasoning-Challenge
repos.desc: Remote-first Kaggle workflow for the NVIDIA Nemotron Model Reasoning Challenge, including a LoRA/PEFT adapter submission loop.

repos.name: lava-challenge-2026
repos.desc: Reproducible experiments and submissions for the LAVA Challenge 2026, with OCR and candidate-evidence caching for document-grounded tasks.

repos.name: handwritten-to-data-experiments
repos.desc: Experiment notes and score tables for the Kaggle Handwritten to Data competition (handwriting-to-structured-data extraction).

groups.title: ML & Kaggle Competitions
groups.blurb: Public experiment logs, reproducible pipelines, and submission artifacts across a wide range of Kaggle and ML competitions.

repos.name: birdclef-2026-experiments
repos.desc: Public experiment workspace for the BirdCLEF+ 2026 bioacoustic code competition, with experiment logs and leaderboard snapshots.

repos.name: arc-prize-2026-arc-agi-2-experiments
repos.desc: Experiment notes, leaderboard snapshots, and dataset references for the ARC Prize 2026 ARC-AGI-2 reasoning benchmark.

repos.name: predicting-stellar-class
repos.desc: Kaggle Playground S6E6 project classifying stellar objects (GALAXY / STAR / QSO) with a reproducible training and inference setup.

repos.name: neural-debris-removal-experiments
repos.desc: Public experiment log and submission artifacts for the Kaggle Neural Debris Removal in streak-detection models competition.

repos.name: predicting-f1-pit-stops
repos.desc: Kaggle Playground S6E5 project for binary classification of Formula 1 pit-stop outcomes, with experiment logs and blending utilities.

repos.name: 3lc-multi-vehicle-detection-challenge
repos.desc: YOLOv8n-from-scratch training, inference, and submission pipeline for the Kaggle 3LC Multi Vehicle Detection Challenge.

repos.name: stock-market-signal-experiments
repos.desc: Experiment archive for the Kaggle Stock Market Signal next-day returns task, using TabICL-based signals and rank blending.

repos.name: orbit-wars-experiment-log
repos.desc: Public notes and result summaries for the Kaggle Orbit Wars simulation competition, limited to experiment logs and leaderboard snapshots.

repos.name: arc-prize-2026-arc-agi-3-public-records
repos.desc: Contest-facing records (experiment outputs, evaluation summaries, submission traces) for ARC Prize 2026 ARC-AGI-3.

repos.name: rogii-wellbore-geology-prediction
repos.desc: Experiment code and competition notes for the Rogii wellbore geology prediction task.

repos.name: neurogolf-2026
repos.desc: Sanitized project mirror for the Kaggle NeuroGolf 2026 competition, recording submissions, experiments, and best public results.

repos.name: bank-customer-churn-challenge-research
repos.desc: Research notes and modeling for the Kaggle bank customer churn challenge (ROC AUC, churn-probability prediction).

repos.name: freuid-challenge-2026
repos.desc: Notes and reproducibility materials for the FREUID Challenge 2026 (IJCAI-ECAI) on identity-document fraud detection.

repos.name: neural-debris-removal-streak-detection
repos.desc: Experiment archive for RetinaNet-based unlearning and confidence calibration in the Neural Debris Removal streak-detection competition.

repos.name: stocks-predict-challenge
repos.desc: Public project record for the Kaggle stocks-challenge (RankIC metric, cross-stock generalization on anonymized features).

repos.name: cvpr-2026-children-challenge-reproducible-runs
repos.desc: Reproducible experiment artifacts with hashed manifests for the CVPR 2026 AI Children Challenge (keypoint-based features).

repos.name: motion-s-text-to-sign-experiments
repos.desc: Reproducible artifacts for the Kaggle Motion-S hierarchical text-to-motion (sign language) generation competition.

groups.title: Systems & Cloud
groups.blurb: Coursework and applied systems work on cloud and edge infrastructure.

repos.name: coursework2-k8s-cloud-edge-vnf
repos.desc: Coursework benchmarking Kubernetes for a telecom DNS virtual network function across cloud-like (kind) and edge-like (K3s) deployments.

zh.heading: 精选作品
zh.intro: 一份持续更新的竞赛流程与课程作业存档——大多为公开的实验记录与可复现实验，覆盖自然语言处理与大语言模型、机器学习以及云系统。

groups.title: 自然语言处理与大语言模型
groups.blurb: 围绕语言的工作，涵盖法律信息检索、大语言模型推理挑战以及基于文档的信息抽取。

repos.name: swiss-legal-ir-experiments
repos.desc: 瑞士法律引用检索实验存档（脱敏），记录提交、公开分数与阈值调优诊断。

repos.name: NVIDIA-Nemotron-Model-Reasoning-Challenge
repos.desc: 面向 NVIDIA Nemotron 模型推理挑战的远程优先 Kaggle 工作流，包含 LoRA/PEFT 适配器提交流程。

repos.name: lava-challenge-2026
repos.desc: LAVA Challenge 2026 的可复现实验与提交，包含面向文档任务的 OCR 与候选证据缓存。

repos.name: handwritten-to-data-experiments
repos.desc: Kaggle Handwritten to Data 竞赛（手写内容转结构化数据抽取）的实验笔记与分数表。

groups.title: 机器学习与 Kaggle 竞赛
groups.blurb: 覆盖多种 Kaggle 与机器学习竞赛的公开实验记录、可复现流程与提交产物。

repos.name: birdclef-2026-experiments
repos.desc: BirdCLEF+ 2026 生物声学代码竞赛的公开实验工作区，含实验日志与排行榜快照。

repos.name: arc-prize-2026-arc-agi-2-experiments
repos.desc: ARC Prize 2026 ARC-AGI-2 推理基准的实验笔记、排行榜快照与数据集索引。

repos.name: predicting-stellar-class
repos.desc: Kaggle Playground S6E6 项目，对恒星天体（星系/恒星/类星体）分类，配有可复现的训练与推理流程。

repos.name: neural-debris-removal-experiments
repos.desc: Kaggle Neural Debris Removal（条纹检测模型去碎片）竞赛的公开实验日志与提交产物。

repos.name: predicting-f1-pit-stops
repos.desc: Kaggle Playground S6E5 项目，对一级方程式进站结果进行二分类，含实验日志与融合工具。

repos.name: 3lc-multi-vehicle-detection-challenge
repos.desc: Kaggle 3LC 多车辆检测挑战的 YOLOv8n 从零训练、推理与提交流程。

repos.name: stock-market-signal-experiments
repos.desc: Kaggle 股市信号次日收益预测任务的实验存档，使用基于 TabICL 的信号与排名融合。

repos.name: orbit-wars-experiment-log
repos.desc: Kaggle Orbit Wars 仿真竞赛的公开笔记与结果摘要，仅含实验日志与排行榜快照。

repos.name: arc-prize-2026-arc-agi-3-public-records
repos.desc: ARC Prize 2026 ARC-AGI-3 的竞赛记录（实验输出、评估摘要、提交追踪）。

repos.name: rogii-wellbore-geology-prediction
repos.desc: Rogii 井筒地质预测任务的实验代码与竞赛笔记。

repos.name: neurogolf-2026
repos.desc: Kaggle NeuroGolf 2026 竞赛的脱敏项目镜像，记录提交、实验与最佳公开成绩。

repos.name: bank-customer-churn-challenge-research
repos.desc: Kaggle 银行客户流失挑战（ROC AUC，流失概率预测）的研究笔记与建模。

repos.name: freuid-challenge-2026
repos.desc: FREUID Challenge 2026（IJCAI-ECAI）身份证件欺诈检测的笔记与可复现材料。

repos.name: neural-debris-removal-streak-detection
repos.desc: Neural Debris Removal 条纹检测竞赛中基于 RetinaNet 的去学习与置信度校准实验存档。

repos.name: stocks-predict-challenge
repos.desc: Kaggle stocks-challenge 的公开项目记录（RankIC 指标，匿名特征上的跨股票泛化）。

repos.name: cvpr-2026-children-challenge-reproducible-runs
repos.desc: CVPR 2026 AI Children Challenge 的可复现实验产物，含哈希清单（基于关键点特征）。

repos.name: motion-s-text-to-sign-experiments
repos.desc: Kaggle Motion-S 分层文本到动作（手语）生成竞赛的可复现产物。

groups.title: 系统与云计算
groups.blurb: 围绕云与边缘基础设施的课程与系统实践工作。

repos.name: coursework2-k8s-cloud-edge-vnf
repos.desc: 课程作业：在类云（kind）与类边缘（K3s）部署中，对电信 DNS 虚拟网络功能进行 Kubernetes 性能基准评测。
